purpose: Product embraced by floating cluster of crystal-clear ice cubes. Cool blue gradient.

subject_description.description: The subject (product, person, scene) to be rendered

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: {product_descriptor} centered and embraced by cluster of large crystal-clear ice cubes floating around and behind, cool blue radial gradient background fading light blue to deep navy at edges, water droplets and condensation on product, thin white vapor mist rising from ice, dramatic side lighting from left at 30 degrees, hyper-realistic, ice shows interior fractures and bubbles, shot on 85mm at f/5.6, no text, no watermark {cultural_constraints_injection}
notes: Intents: launch, grow. Source code in research corpus: T06. Saudi adaptation guidance: May-September window. Saudi temperatures exceed 45C; cool visual produces emotional resonance warm imagery cannot match in summer. Reference image: Required. Recommended frequency: 1 per month during summer.
